rationale: Educ. Code §12.153 grants the commissioner rulemaking authority for its subchapter. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 12.153. RULES. The commissioner may adopt rules to implement this subchapter.
_note: No conflict detected; the rule text concerns charter school subchapter rulemaking and is unrelated to homestead exemption valuation.
